title: Swim Speed
excerpt: Swim Speed is the movement rating that lets a creature move through water without paying the ordinary extra swimming cost. Questions about water movement resolve through the broader swimming and speed entries.
markdown: # Swim Speed A Swim Speed is the part of a creature's movement profile that lets it move through water without the ordinary extra movement cost that Swimming usually imposes. Questions about switching movement types, reduced movement, or how much water travel remains in the current move resolve through Special Speeds, Speed, and Changes to Your Speeds. Water can still become harder to cross when Difficult Terrain or another effect says it does.
